### Free Shipping on Orders $115 and Up. Lower 48 States Only.

Effective Date: 9/9/25

The Rag Company is committed to shipping your order quickly, safely, and affordably. Please review the details of our shipping policy below.

 

Shipping Coverage

We currently ship only within the United States, including:

Alaska and Hawaii

State-side APO/FPO addresses

We do not ship internationally. If you are located outside the U.S., please visit our Distributor Page to find an authorized reseller in your region.

 

Processing Time

Most orders are processed and shipped within 48 hours of being received.

During peak sale times can extend the time it takes us to process the orders.

Orders are shipped Monday through Saturday (excluding holidays).

Delivery timeframes begin once the carrier picks up the order from our warehouse.

 

Shipping Rates

Flat Rate: $9.99 for orders under $115 (pre-tax, after discounts).

Free Shipping: Orders $115 and above (pre-tax, after discounts).

Rates are applied automatically at checkout.

 

Carriers & Methods

USPS Priority Mail (2–3 days) is our primary shipping method.

USPS Parcel Select or UPS may be used at our discretion if more cost-effective.

Shipping times vary by carrier and destination; we cannot guarantee specific delivery dates.

 

Tracking Information

A tracking number will be emailed once your order leaves our warehouse.

Please check your spam/junk folders if you do not see the email.

Incorrect or missing email addresses will prevent tracking updates.

 

Delivery & Liability

Most packages are delivered without requiring a signature. Drivers may leave packages at their discretion.

A “signature required” service is available by request for an additional fee.

Once a package is delivered to the shipping address provided, The Rag Company is not responsible for lost, stolen, or misdelivered packages.

Customers are responsible for providing accurate and complete shipping information at checkout.

 

Questions

If you have any questions about shipping or need assistance with your order, please contact us at support@theragcompany.com.

[
FULL CASE DISCOUNT
](https://theragcompany.com/products/ik-multi-tr-1-360-case)

The iK Multi TR 1 360 is a high-performance, professional-grade sprayer designed for optimal results across a variety of applications, including cleaning and disinfection, automotive and bike detailing, virus and pest control, and light industrial use. Its 360° functionality allows for efficient spraying at any angle, making it ideal for precision tasks on small or hard-to-reach surfaces.

Engineered for professional use, the TR 1 360 is built to handle even the most aggressive chemicals with maximum safety, durability, and ease of use.

### Key Features

- 360° Spray System – Allows spraying from any position or angle, even upside down
- Stable Base Design – Enhanced stability during use and refill
- 1-Liter Translucent Tank (35oz) – Durable container with clear level indicators for easy monitoring
- Chemical Identification System – Includes interchangeable color tags for quick and easy content identification

### Cleaning & Maintenance Guidelines

- Always depressurize the sprayer and rinse thoroughly with clean water after each use. 
- Properly dispose of any remaining chemical residue in accordance with local regulations. 
- If the nozzle becomes clogged, flush it with water only—do not use metal objects to clear obstructions. 
- For blocked handle filters, remove and rinse with clean water. 
- Store in a sheltered environment, avoiding exposure to freezing temperatures or excessive heat (ideal range: 5°C to 30°C). 
- To extend seal life, apply a light grease to all moving parts regularly.

### Safety Information

- Always follow the instructions and recommended dosages found on the chemical product’s packaging.
- Do not smoke, eat, or drink while preparing or spraying chemicals to avoid accidental ingestion.
- Never spray toward people, animals, electrical devices, open flames, or any ignition source.
- Always wear appropriate protective gear, including gloves, goggles, masks, and protective footwear, to minimize chemical exposure.
- Carefully read the sprayer’s user manual before use. Do not modify the unit or tamper with safety mechanisms like the pressure relief valve.

### Chemical Compatibility

- Optimal: Disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkalis, ketones
- Limited Use: Diluted acids (up to 5%), solvents (hydrocarbons), petroleum derivatives
